form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr2) over 1800m at this track, beaten 40 m by Signature Look (2:12.30) in 2 LIFETIME WINS on March 28 at $71. Before that 6th (Fr2) over 1800m at this track was 3rd-3.8 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Oakhay (2:15.10) in 1 LIFETIME WIN on March 24 at $71. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4.5 m third behind Alimonie at this track over 1800m NR up to 39 last start. Before that was beaten 1.4 metres second again at this track same class on March 23. May prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Backs up three days after he failed to impress was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 1800m after racing wide at this track beaten 22 m by Just Mocha (2:13.70) in 3yo+ No NR GROUP on April 11 at $81. Before that 7th (Fr4) over 1800m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track beaten 20 m by Nancestiger (2:11.80) in 6 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $68.50. Has the task ahead.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Sr2) over 1800m at this track beaten 50 m by Alimonie (2:16.00) in NR up to 39 on April 4 at $49. Wait until the form picks up.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track was leading by 2.2 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Trigger (2:13.10) in NR 40 to 43 on April 4 at $2.40. Can be right in the thick of things.
